summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Market Lean Consistency fix (ISSUE 1) and Live Baseball Detection fix (ISSUE 2). All backend pure functions, integration points, and regression scenarios validated successfully.

backend_issues.notes: All backend functionality working as expected. Market lean classifier correctly detects mismatches and logs MARKET_LEAN_MISMATCH warnings. Time filter correctly handles live baseball matches with allow_live_for_sports parameter.

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend loads successfully. HistoricalProfilePanel.jsx component has correct conditional rendering logic for REVIEW_REQUIRED state with data-testid attributes in place. Unable to test live baseball UI rendering due to lack of live baseball data during test execution.

passed_tests: market_lean_classifier.py: classify_market_lean() - Angels @ Rays case (expected=6.7, line=9.5) returns UNDER with delta=-2.8
market_lean_classifier.py: classify_market_lean() - expected=10.8, line=8.5 returns OVER with delta=2.3
market_lean_classifier.py: classify_market_lean() - expected=9.0, line=9.5 returns NONE (delta -0.5, abs<1.0)
market_lean_classifier.py: confidence enriched from p_under (86% from p_under=0.86)
market_lean_classifier.py: reason text in Spanish with 'carreras' and 'por debajo/encima'
validate_lean_consistency(): UNDER + 'Under 9.5' → consistent=True, mismatch=False
validate_lean_consistency(): OVER + 'Under 9.5' → consistent=False, mismatch=True with warning
validate_lean_consistency(): warning populated with Spanish explanation
classify_and_validate(): Angels @ Rays → display_lean='UNDER' (consistent case)
classify_and_validate(): mismatch case → display_lean='REVIEW_REQUIRED'
classify_and_validate(): consistency block present in output
time_filter.py: is_match_upcoming() rejects live baseball when allow_live=False
time_filter.py: is_match_upcoming() accepts live baseball when allow_live=True
time_filter.py: filter_upcoming() keeps live baseball with allow_live_for_sports={'baseball'}
time_filter.py: filter_upcoming() tags live baseball with _live_route=True
time_filter.py: filter_upcoming() drops live football (not in allow_live_for_sports)
validate_pick_before_output(): baseball live picks NOT blocked
validate_pick_before_output(): football live picks ARE blocked (regression preserved)
analyst_engine.py: imports time_filter module
analyst_engine.py: uses allow_live_for_sports parameter
analyst_engine.py: baseball configured in allow_live_for_sports={'baseball'}
Regression: football upcoming matches still work
Regression: basketball upcoming matches still work
Regression: finished matches still dropped regardless of sport
MARKET_LEAN_MISMATCH logger exists and is accessible
Mismatch detection triggers without error and logs to MARKET_LEAN_MISMATCH logger
classify_market_lean() handles None values gracefully (returns lean=NONE, expected_runs=0.0)
classify_market_lean() boundary case delta=-1.0 → UNDER (threshold test)
is_match_upcoming() correctly infers live status from 'In Progress' status string
Frontend: App loads successfully
Frontend: Login with demo credentials works
Frontend: Dashboard renders after login
Frontend: No error messages on page load

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (smoke test passed, component code review passed)

issue_1_market_lean_consistency.description: Market lean classifier now provides single source of truth. Mismatches between lean and recommended pick are detected and logged.
test_coverage: Pure function classify_market_lean() with Angels @ Rays canonical case
Threshold rules: expected_runs <= line-1.0 → UNDER, expected_runs >= line+1.0 → OVER, |delta|<1.0 → NONE
validate_lean_consistency() detects OVER vs UNDER mismatch
MARKET_LEAN_MISMATCH logger receives warnings with game_id, expected_runs, market_line, lean, recommended_market

verified: Conditional rendering: display_lean === 'REVIEW_REQUIRED' shows amber badge with AlertTriangle icon
Warning block with consistency.warning text displayed when mismatch detected
Lean reason chip shown when consistent
frontend_integration.notes: Component code review confirms correct implementation. Live UI testing not possible due to lack of live baseball data during test execution.

issue_2_live_baseball_detection.description: Live baseball matches (status 'In Progress', is_live=true) are now kept by filter_upcoming() when allow_live_for_sports={'baseball'} is passed.
test_coverage: is_match_upcoming() returns True for live baseball when allow_live=True
is_match_upcoming() returns False for live baseball when allow_live=False (legacy behavior)
filter_upcoming() keeps live baseball matches and tags with _live_route=True
filter_upcoming() drops live football/basketball (not in allow_live_for_sports)
validate_pick_before_output() exempts baseball live picks from MATCH_ALREADY_PLAYED block
validate_pick_before_output() still blocks football/basketball live picks (regression)
Finished matches still dropped regardless of sport
wiring_verified: time_filter.py: validate_pick_before_output() has baseball live exemption
Status inference: 'In Progress', 'Inning X', 'Top X', 'Bot X' all recognized as live

verified: Football upcoming matches still work (is_match_upcoming returns True)
Basketball upcoming matches still work (is_match_upcoming returns True)
Finished matches still dropped (filter_upcoming drops them)
Live football/basketball still blocked by validate_pick_before_output()
Non-baseball sports unaffected by allow_live_for_sports parameter
